refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements, and manage their updates and history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and combines multiple functions; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional responsibilities and supports traceability and calibration history requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs, and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates and maintain history of performance requirements

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine with data input adapters
Centralized performance requirements database with versioning
Management interface for updates and history tracking
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining derivation algorithms, database storage with version control, and management interface

potential_sources: Data flow between derivation and recording functions
Versioning dependencies between recording and management
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module coupling and supports traceability and history management.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of reliable worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if versioning is not robust
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing derivation and management interfaces if complexity grows to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the overall NGHE system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and updates with remote management or cloud services

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this functionality is core to NGHE software; low diffusion risk due to centralized implementation.
Vehicle module is primarily physical and control focused; poor containment and high diffusion risk if assigned here.
Teleoperation focuses on remote control; not suitable for performance requirement management.
Safety Services may consume performance data but is not responsible for derivation or management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management in NGHE Solution module minimizes interface complexity and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential overload of NGHE Solution module if functionality grows too large
Dependency on accurate and timely telemetry data input
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module size and consider splitting derivation and management into submodules if complexity increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are clearly mapped to candidate DPs with logical grouping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized implementation in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution module, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within NGHE Solution software.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Review telemetry data quality and interface robustness
Plan for modularization if NGHE Solution module grows in complexity

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement of sub-FRs and modularization of DPs within NGHE Solution is advisable to manage complexity and maintain safety criticality.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates and maintain history of performance requirements

revise.why: To modularize derivation, recording, and management functions within NGHE Solution for better containment and maintainability.

open_risks: Data inconsistency risk if versioning fails
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability from worksite inputs to performance targets
